'''Bezzem''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] who frequented [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. While drinking a [[Blue Dwarf]], he listened to the 90-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old [[Tem Chesko]]'s tale of his 71-year [[syntonium crystal]] haul from [[Cirus II]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Bezzem was also a friend of [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]].

==Biography==

===Early life===
Bezzem was once a friend of the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]],<ref name=":0">{{GalaxyCite|3|Tales from Mos Eisley: Mostly Automatic}}</ref> before he was killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]<ref name="Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> He remebered how his pal used to make a run from [[Cirus II]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in less than five cycles.<ref name=":0" />

===Meeting Chesko===
Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]<ref>''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley|''Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley'']] relative to the Battle of Yavin.</ref> Bezzem was frequenting [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where he took a [[Blue Dwarf]] as drink. He sat down with a 90-year-old man named [[Tem Chesko]]. Chesko pointed outside the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina's]] window at his ship, and told Bezzem that he just landed here this morning after a 71-year-long [[syntonium crystal]] haul from [[Cirus II]]. Bezzem queries as to how it could take that long, so Tem went his backstory, about how he had to endure an over 60 years journey alongside a feminine, green service [[Droid/Legends|droid]] named [[Millie]].<ref name=":0" />

Tem talked who he grew old and weak as she continued to take care of him. He retold how, at the age of 86 and laying in his bed, Tem asked Millie to kill him, and handed her his [[Laser knife/Legends|laser knife]]. Tem told Bezzem that that was the hardest day of his life. Bezzem then asked how he could still be here and what happened to Millie, and Tem answers both questions by revealing Millie's inner workings transplanted into his chest.<ref name=":0" />

==Personality and traits==
A friendly individual, Bezzem belonged to a green-skinned [[Species/Legends|species]] with large red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He was seen wearing googles, a jacket and was branding a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]].<ref name=":0" />

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxyCite|3|Tales from Mos Eisley: Mostly Automatic}} {{1st}}
